feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Observations on NSE Implementation for CDPOS Table in QS1
entry.content:
We would like to share observations from a recently completed project. We implemented an NSE setup for the CDPOS table in QS1, where the table was partitioned into three parts and moved to warm storage. Currently, all three partitions reside in warm storage, and the overall RAM consumption of the CDPOS table is approximately 1.2 GB.

However, we have observed that the RAM consumption of the CDPOS table increases whenever data from the warm partitions is accessed. We would like to understand whether the system is loading data from warm storage into hot storage even when the request is only for read access.

If the system is indeed reloading data into hot storage upon each read request, we would also like to know when this data gets unloaded. Additionally, is there a way to explicitly unload the data from hot storage (buffer cache) immediately after the request has been processed?

entry.title: Temporary Elevated Authorizations for Named Users (Firefighter Scenario) – Licensing Impact FUE
entry.content:
We have a customer who uses a firefighter-like process where a named user is temporarily granted additional authorizations to run a specific program upon request. In this setup, there is no dedicated firefighter user ID; instead, an existing named user receives elevated access for a limited period of time.

We would like clarification regarding SAP licensing implications for this scenario:

  1. If a named user is temporarily assigned higher-level authorizations, is the user automatically considered to require the corresponding higher license type?
  2. Is it permissible to assign such elevated authorizations only for a few hours or for a short temporary period without triggering a permanent license change?
  3. Are there any official rules or thresholds (for example, number of hours or duration of use) that determine when a higher license is required?
  4. When does the weekly SLIM report run, and when will the updated license data be visible in the SAP for Me dashboard?

We would appreciate guidance or references to official SAP documentation on this topic.

 

thank you

kind regards

Beatrix

entry.content:

Good day!

Can you please kindly help me how to create new options in the flag thar correspond to CL20N in APP F2705 in FIORI? 

 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EWM Pack Specification: How to find the table/link between internal node GUID and Pack Spec ID?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am working with EWM Packaging Specifications in transaction /SCWM/PACKSPEC and I am trying to understand how the internal technical identifier stored in the below tables is related to the displayed Pack Spec ID on the screen of /SCWM/PACKSPEC.

Tables:

Header- /SCWM/S_PS_DL_HEADER
Content - /SCWM/S_PS_DL_CONTENT
Level - /SCWM/S_PS_DL_LEVEL
Level Element - /SCWM/S_PS_DL_LEVEL_ELEMENT

Basically, it is getting difficult to identify the Pack Specification created in /SCWM/PACKSPEC. When you open the tables to see the data, the Pack Spec ID is not stored in the tables, instead a GUID (Internal Node Number) is stored. So wanted to find a way which can give me a relation between them.

What I found so far:

  • The field PS_ID is shown in structure /SCWM/S_PS_HEADER_INT
  • Data element is /SCWM/DE_PSID
  • So this looks like a structure field, not a direct database table field

My doubt is:

Is there any standard SAP table that gives the relation between:

  • the internal node/header GUID (technical number, for example from pack spec tables), and
  • the normal Pack Spec ID (PS_ID) shown in /SCWM/PACKSPEC?

I am specifically looking for a table or standard object that can help convert/map:
internal GUID / node number → Pack Spec ID

If anyone knows:

  • the exact table name,
  • a CDS/view,
  • or the standard relationship between these objects,

that would really help.

 

Thank You

entry.title: How to capture all the existing Fiori catalogs and tile inside it in one single TR
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please help to  capture all the existing Fiori catalogs and tile inside it in one single TR in SAP S4HANA 2023

Could community have a hint that where should I start looking for what is missing?

entry.title: EXCEPTION SEGMENT UNKNOWN RAISED error while calling RFC IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE in Biztalk Middlewar
entry.content:
Hello Mates,

Good Day!

Currently we are facing issue when importing the extended idocs from SAP S4 to biztalk with IDOC segment release 701. We tried changing the WE20 outbound partner profiles parameter idoc release to 701 and also in T-code WE82 but no luck. All segments are in released stated and unlocked and also verified AUTH Issue.

I highly doubt the feasibility and compatability if SAP S4 actually accepts 701 release or not?!!!

Flow:

SAP S4 (idoc extension with 701 release)  -> MS Biztalk -> EDI Partners

Error:

Error while retrieving or generating the WSDL. Adapter message: Details: ErrorCode=RFC_EXCEPTION. ErrorGroup=RFC_ERROR_APPLICATION_EXCEPTION. SapErrorMessage=EXCEPTION SEGMENT_UNKNOWN RAISED.  AdapterErrorMessage=Error returned by RfcCallReceiveEx while calling RFC: IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE..

 

Screenshot:

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS

entry.title: [S/4HANA Private Cloud] Flexible Workflow – Sales Order Remains Blocked After Auto-Skip
entry.content:
I’m facing an issue with Flexible Workflow for Sales Orders.

Requirement

  • ZCS + condition ZP06 : trigger approval
  • ZCS without ZP06 : auto-release (no approval)

Implementation

  • BAdI SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON : sets approval reason Z005 for all ZCS
  • Workflow created in Manage Workflows for Sales Orders
  • Custom condition evaluator ZSWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVA

Important Constraint

  • BAdI runs before COMMIT WORK
  • Pricing data (ZP06 in PRCD_ELEMENTS) not yet persisted
  • SELECT not allowed due to transactional contract FUNCTIONAL

 Therefore, launch condition based on ZP06 is unreliable

Workaround Applied

  • Launch condition = NONE
  • Step condition = check ZP06 (via custom evaluator after COMMIT)

Behavior

  • With ZP06 : approval works 
  • Without ZP06:
    • Step condition = FALSE → step skipped 
    • Workflow log = Completed (SWI1) 
    • BUT order remains blocked 

Error

V2468 – Sales document is being processed for approval

Observation

  • No pending work items
  • Workflow WS02000006 = Completed
  • Status in VA03 = In Approval Process

Root Cause (suspected)

If step is skipped:

  • releaseSalesOrder action is never triggered
  • Approval status is not reset
  • Document remains locked

Question

How can we handle this standard gap?

  • Is there a way to force release when no approval step is executed?
  • Any BAdI / enhancement to reset approval status?
  • Or recommended design pattern for this scenario?

entry.title: Configuration parameter [execution]/default_statement_concurrency_limit set to unsupported value.
entry.content:
Hello,

   I found the following warning message in the DBA cockpit.

      Configuration parameter [execution]/default_statement_concurrency_limit set to unsupported value.

   Please check and fix it.

entry.title: How to use ERS with Service PO
entry.content:
How to use ERS with Service PO?

Service PO does not have Goods receipt, so how can we use ERS/transaction MRER to invoice these POs?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to delete a custom field created via Coding Block in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud 2025
entry.content:
We created a field via Coding Block transaction OXK3 in development system. It is not extended to the screens yet.

Due to requirement change, we do not need this field any more. The ACDOCA table contains only 2 entries in DEV environment. There is no data saved in the custom field. I DON'T want to move this field to further systems.

Can I delete this field from coding block?

From all the analysis I have done, I understand that this will impact the tables at database level. But, that can be managed by re-generating the database tables and views. 

Since only development system is impacted with little or no data in the tables, I don't think it would have any impact as such on the system. I would like to know some expert thoughts on deleting custom field created via coding block in a fairly new development system.

entry.title: We need to read purchase requisition header text in email notification in PR flexible workflow
entry.content:
For workflow scenario WS02000458, we need to read purchase requisition header text (Text Object : EBANH, Text ID : B01) and send that in email notification in PR flexible workflow. Is there any standard CDS view available which can be used to read the purchase requisition header text. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

Owen Wang

entry.title: Need Cloud BADI for Fiori App “Transfer Stock - In Plant” (Movement Type 311) in S/4HANA Private
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am looking for a Cloud BADI or enhancement spot for the Fiori app “Transfer Stock - In Plant” in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

Requirement:

  1. Validate data during stock transfer posting
  2. Movement type: 311
  3. Need enhancement during item validation / posting process.
    Could anyone help identify the BADI name

Thank you,
Purvi

entry.title: Intimation from system in case of material unavailability in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to understand if anyone has implemented a similar scenario in SAP S/4HANA PM/MM.

We are using Preventive Maintenance with Maintenance Plans where maintenance orders are generated periodically based on time intervals. The maintenance orders contain components/spare parts that are required for execution.

Business requirement is as follows:

  • When a maintenance plan is scheduled (or before the next maintenance call/order is generated), the system should check whether the required components are available in stock.
  • This validation could be for:
    • only the next maintenance call/order, or
    • all upcoming maintenance orders generated from the maintenance plan.
  • If any component is unavailable, below required stock, or expected to face shortage/deficit, the system should send some kind of notification/intimation to a specific user or team.
  • Based on this notification, the responsible user should manually create a Purchase Requisition for the required component.

Important point:
We do NOT want to use automatic PR creation based on safety stock or standard MRP-driven replenishment. Requirement is specifically linked to PM maintenance planning and component availability for upcoming maintenance activities.

Has anyone achieved something similar using:

  • standard SAP functionality,
  • MRP exception messages,
  • maintenance plan enhancements/BAdIs,
  • workflow,
  • Fiori apps,
  • custom developments,
  • or any other approach?

Would appreciate suggestions, best practices, or limitations to consider.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Joule unified setup in TDD environment (SuccessFactors and S/4H PE).
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have a question related to Joule unified setup in TDD environment.

As we know Joule unified setup requires that all systems are managed by one IAS instance.

Now we have:

  • Cloud TDD for S/4HANA Cloud PE, 1 System (8012331)
  • Cloud TD, SF HCM Business Package (8007218)
  • Cloud TDD, Joule base entitlement (8020592)
  • Cloud TDD, Joule for developers ABAP AI (8019541)

Is it possible to move SuccessFactors from predefined IAS to IAS that is used with S/4HANA Cloud PE to use Jule TDD (unified setup) in both systems?

Or is there any other method to achieve this goal (utilize Joule TDD unified setup in TDD environment)?

entry.title: Pacemaker workcenter requirement for capacity scheduling board
entry.content:
In SAP Notes such as 3557362 - Issue with "Realign Schedules" and "Schedule Production" Buttons in Capacity Scheduling Board - SAP for Me, a pacemaker workcenter is listed as a requirement for orders to be scheduled via the Capacity Scheduling Board app. As I understand the pacemaker workcenter is expected to be updated in the 'Production Line' field for the material's production version. 

The current client I work for has a production set up where a product can be produced on x similar production lines. The capacity scheduling process is used to optimize the load across the production lines. In such case there is no single pacemaker workcenter per se - does it mean x number of production versions need to be created just to have each of the possible production lines as pacemakers? This creates unnecessary data maintenance requirement in my opinion and make no sense, or have I understood this wrongly?

Appreciate any advice that experts here can provide. Thank you!

Side note: Description for the 'Production Line' field indicates it is for repetitive manufacturing, but I suppose it is also relevant for discrete manufacturing now. Perhaps the description needs to be updated...

entry.title: Output parameter determination
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to configure Output Parameter Determination settings for Sales Quotations; however, the system is only displaying options for Purchase Orders and Requests for Quotations. Please refer to the attached screenshot for reference.

Could you please advise on the possible cause of this issue?

Additionally, the developed form templates are not appearing for Sales Quotations either.

Your guidance on this would be highly appreciated.

. 

Best regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Sales Employee
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to configure the Partner Function (Sales Employee) as a Supplier. However, while assigning the Account Group to the Sales Employee partner function, the system is displaying only Customer Account Groups and not Supplier Account Groups.

This issue persists even after assigning the Partner Type “LI (Vendor)” to the Sales Employee partner function.

I have attached screenshots for your reference.

Could you please advise on the possible cause of this issue and let me know if I am missing any configuration steps? This is quite urgent, as I am currently handling a live issue.

Your prompt support would be highly appreciated.

Best regards,

Dinesh
